query.original: Do you add your proficiency bonus to every saving throw?
query.used: Do you add your proficiency bonus to all saving throws in DnD 5e?

retrieved_nodes.preview: In Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition (DnD 5e), you do not add your proficiency bonus to all saving throws. Instead, you only add your proficiency bonus to saving throws for which your character has profi

answer: I cannot find this in the provided rules that you add your proficiency bonus to all saving throws in DnD 5e. Instead, you only add your proficiency bonus to saving throws for which your character has proficiency.

correctness.feedback: The generated answer is fully correct and directly addresses the user query, clearly explaining that the proficiency bonus is only added to saving throws for which the character has proficiency. It aligns perfectly with the reference answer.
